title: Manage the Do Not Call List
lede: Add numbers you must never dial. Any number on this list is automatically skipped by your campaigns, so you stay compliant without extra work.

steps.title: Open the Do Not Call list
steps.content:
1. In the left menu, under Call Center, open Do Not Call.
  2. You'll see every blocked number, when it was added, and any matching contact, lead, or call log.

images.caption: The Do Not Call list with search, import, and per-row actions
The Do Not Call list with search, import, and per-row actions

steps.title: Add numbers (import or type them in)
steps.content:
1. Click Import Numbers in the top right.
  2. Choose Upload File to drag in a .txt or .csv (one number per line, or comma / semicolon separated), then click Import Numbers.
  3. Or choose Manual Input, paste or type the numbers, and click Add Numbers.

Duplicate numbers are handled automatically, so it's safe to re-import a list.

steps.title: Find and remove numbers
steps.content:
• Use the Search phone numbers box to find a specific number.
  • Click the red Remove icon on a row to delete a single number.
  • Tick several rows and use Delete Selected to remove them in bulk.

steps.title: How it protects your campaigns
steps.content: Every campaign automatically checks this list before dialing — matching numbers are skipped, so you don't have to scrub your dial lists by hand. You can also mark a contact or lead as Do Not Call from their record, and use the API Info button to add numbers programmatically.

cards.title: Manage Contacts
cards.description: Mark records as Do Not Call at the source.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io

  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials

metaTitle: Manage the Do Not Call List | iMash Docs
metaDescription: Add numbers to the iMash Do Not Call list by import or manual entry. Blocked numbers are automatically skipped by your campaigns to keep dialing compliant.
metaKeywords: do not call, dnc list, suppression list, block numbers, calling compliance, tcpa, imash campaigns
